infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to show the teleprompter overlay on your camera feed.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs microphone access to record video with audio.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs photo library access to save your recordings.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Teleprompter to access your camera for recording.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Teleprompter to access your microphone for recording audio.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Teleprompter to save recordings to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Teleprompter to save recordings to your photo library.
